name: The Lost Sheep
oracleText: Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.
flavorText: "He goeth after that which is lost, until he find it." — Luke 15:4
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Jan Luyken's "Parable of the Lost Sheep" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain underlying etching; Commons notes the Bowyer Bible reproduction is released under FAL.
classics.creditText: Jan Luyken, Parable of the Lost Sheep
classics.sourceNotes: Good fit for the searching-and-rescuing parable.
